subjects.description: drone camera exploring the Amazon jungle from above to canopy level
subjects.appearance_details: invisible aerial camera perspective with smooth flight, wide establishing view, descending movement, and close inspection of plants and river curves
subjects.relationship: viewer perspective guiding the journey through the rainforest
subjects.location: above the Amazon canopy, then descending toward a winding river and colorful jungle flora
subjects.relative_size: camera viewpoint moving through a vast landscape
subjects.orientation: facing forward and downward, gradually lowering into the jungle
subjects.pose: smooth stabilized flight with a controlled descent
subjects.action: glides over endless green canopy, descends toward the river, and pushes into vibrant flowers under filtered sunlight
subjects.state_changes: altitude lowers; river details become clearer; canopy gives way to close flora textures

subjects.description: vast Amazon rainforest canopy and winding river
subjects.appearance_details: dense emerald tree crowns, layered vines, mist pockets, serpentine brown-green river water, riverbanks, and occasional breaks in the canopy
subjects.relationship: primary natural environment revealed by the drone
subjects.location: spanning the full frame from horizon to foreground
subjects.relative_size: immense landscape filling the entire world of the shot
subjects.orientation: canopy spreads horizontally while the river snakes diagonally through the forest
subjects.pose: living landscape with leaves moving in wind and river flowing slowly
subjects.action: sways, shimmers, and reveals depth as the drone descends
subjects.state_changes: wide canopy becomes a detailed forest edge; river widens in view; sun patches shift across leaves
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: lush leaves, bark, vines, muddy water, wet foliage, and humid haze

subjects.description: colorful Amazon flowers and dense understory plants
subjects.appearance_details: bright red, orange, yellow, purple, and white blossoms among broad leaves, ferns, vines, moss, and small glints of moisture
subjects.relationship: close foreground biodiversity highlighted after the descent
subjects.location: lower canopy and jungle floor edges near the river
subjects.relative_size: small botanical details against the vast rainforest
subjects.orientation: flowers angled toward filtered sunlight and wet leaves
subjects.action: flutter lightly, catch sun flecks, and reveal intricate textures as the camera moves close
subjects.state_changes: flowers grow larger in frame; dew highlights appear; background canopy blurs softly
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: velvety petals, glossy leaves, wet bark, moss, and organic textures

background_setting: The Amazon jungle stretches to the horizon, with endless green canopy, a winding river, humid haze, layered plants, colorful flowers, and filtered sunlight creating dappled shadows.

lighting.conditions: Warm tropical sunlight broken by thick canopy leaves, with bright dappled beams, soft humid haze, and gleaming highlights on water and wet foliage.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm tropical sunlight broken by thick canopy leaves, with bright dappled beams, soft humid haze, and gleaming highlights on water and wet foliage.

aesthetics.composition: Immersive natural wonder, vivid biodiversity, aerial scale, lush textures, peaceful wilderness, and a sense of discovery inside untouched rainforest.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Immersive natural wonder, vivid biodiversity, aerial scale, lush textures, peaceful wilderness, and a sense of discovery inside untouched rainforest.

cinematography.camera_motion: Smooth drone descent from high aerial panorama to river reveal and close botanical pass, stabilized motion with gentle forward glide and depth-rich parallax.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Cinematic rainforest realism with vibrant color, humid atmosphere, and detailed ecological texture.
context: A drone explores the Amazon, moving from a breathtaking aerial view to a closer look at the river and the colorful living details beneath the canopy.

actions.description: The drone glides above the endless Amazon canopy, showing lush green forest stretching to the horizon.
It descends smoothly toward a winding river, revealing layered trees, mist pockets, and dappled sunlight.
The camera enters the jungle edge and settles on colorful flowers and wet leaves shimmering below the canopy.

segments.description: Establish the Amazon from high altitude, a vast green canopy under warm daylight.
segments.key_changes: The drone begins a smooth descent and the river line starts to appear.
segments.camera: High aerial drone shot, forward glide, slight downward tilt.

segments.description: Reveal the river winding through dense forest while canopy layers and humid haze create depth.
segments.key_changes: Altitude drops, river becomes prominent, and leaf texture sharpens.
segments.camera: Descending stabilized drone move toward the river corridor.

segments.description: Move close to vibrant flowers, ferns, and glossy leaves beneath filtered sunlight.
segments.key_changes: Wide landscape shifts into intimate biodiversity detail with soft background blur.
segments.camera: Low canopy push in with shallow depth of field on flowers.

temporal_caption: A drone descends from a sweeping Amazon jungle panorama to a winding river and vivid tropical flowers under dappled sunlight.
audio_description: Soft drone air movement, distant river flow, layered bird calls, rustling leaves, insects, and humid rainforest ambience.
